title: Contact - Karl Turner MP
headings: h3: Contact Information for Karl Turner, MP for Hull East
text_excerpt: Contact - Karl Turner MP Skip to main content Contact News Surgery Appointments Casework About Sign up to Karl’s Newsletter More Menu Contact Contact Information for Karl Turner, MP for Hull East Assisting constituents with their problems and taking up concerns is Karl’s number one priority. Due to strict Parliamentary protocol Karl is unable to make representations for anyone who does not live within the Kingston upon Hull East constituency. Please supply your full name and address when writing to Karl. You can contact the office on: Email: karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk Phone: 01482 781 019 (Hull East Office) Phone: 0207 219 7088 (Westminster Office) To write to Karl: Karl Turner MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA (Please supply your full name and address) Social Media You can also follow Karl on social media: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/karlturner4easthull/ Twitter: @KarlTurnerMP Subscribe to my monthly newsletter Subscribe Contact details 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW, UK View on Google Maps Email: karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by East Hull Labour Party on behalf of Karl Turner, both at 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
